summary.key_theme: 受惠於電力基礎設施需求激增與 AI 產業擴張，Quanta Services 訂單積壓強勁且估值獲大幅上調。

bullish.title: How The Quanta Services (PWR) Narrative Is Evolving With Backlog, Guidance And Valuation Shifts
bullish.reason: 分析師將公平價值預估從 479.09 美元大幅上調至 593.30 美元，漲幅約 24 %，反映市場對其長期成長潛力的重新定價。

bullish.title: PWR- An AI Play that Keeps Delivering for Investors
bullish.reason: 投資人日活動強化了公司作為 AI 基礎設施關鍵受惠者的地位，證明其不僅是傳統公用事業供應商，更具備高成長動能。

bullish.title: Can Quanta Gain From Rising Utility and Power Infrastructure Spend?
bullish.reason: 探討電力基礎設施支出增加對公司訂單積壓（Backlog）與長期營收的正面驅動效應，具備高度成長確定性。

bullish.title: Got $10,000? This Quiet Electrification Stock Up 100%+ Could Still Be a No‑Brainer "Buy and Never Sell."
bullish.reason: 強調電氣化趨勢將持續推動訂單成長，長期投資價值被看好，建議作為核心持股。

bullish.title: Bank of America Securities Maintains Buy Rating on Quanta Services (PWR) Stock
bullish.reason: 美銀證券維持買入評級，並將其列為長期多倍成長股（Multibagger），顯示機構投資人對其基本面信心強勁。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Exceeds Market Returns: Some Facts to Consider
bullish.reason: 股價單日上漲 2.46 %，顯示市場動能強勁，持續優於大盤表現。

bullish.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Outperforms Broader Market: What You Need to Know
bullish.reason: 股價單日上漲 1.79 %，進一步確認了近期股價的強勢走勢。

neutral.title: Quanta Services Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release & Webcast Schedule
neutral.reason: 僅為例行性的財報發布時程公告，本身不具備多空方向，但為市場關注焦點。
